# Priyanshu Chawda

## Overview
Priyanshu Chawda is an AI-focused software engineer from Pune, India. He builds LLM workflows, MCP tools, developer automation, and full-stack AI applications with typed APIs, evals, safety boundaries, TypeScript, Python, Gemini, and Next.js.

## CodeAudit MCP
- Page: https://priyanshuworks.tech/projects/codeaudit
- GitHub: https://github.com/priyanshuchawda/codeaudit
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@priyanshuchawda/codeaudit
- skills.sh: https://skills.sh/priyanshuchawda/codeaudit
- Package: @priyanshuchawda/codeaudit
- Skill: codeaudit
- Version: 0.1.3
- Install: npx -y @priyanshuchawda/codeaudit
- Skill install: npx skills add priyanshuchawda/codeaudit --skill codeaudit
- Summary: CodeAudit MCP is a read-only TypeScript Model Context Protocol server and codeaudit skill for local repository inspection, AI code audits, code quality review, security checks, documentation evidence checks, skill routing, and issue or PR planning.
- Safety: read-only by default, bounded to the supplied project root, redacts common secret formats, and does not expose unrestricted shell execution, auto-push, auto-merge, auto-delete, or remote repository mutation tools.
- Keywords: CodeAudit MCP, codeaudit, @priyanshuchawda/codeaudit, Model Context Protocol server, MCP server, AI code audit, improve code quality, AI code review, repository audit MCP, npm MCP server, skills CLI codeaudit, Codex MCP server, Claude MCP server, skill routing, documentation evidence audit.

## Services
- MCP Tool Development: Model Context Protocol tools and servers for AI agent tool access.
- LLM Workflow Engineering: RAG, prompt, evaluation, and orchestration workflows.
- Full-Stack AI Applications: Next.js, TypeScript, and Python AI product builds.
